name: Banani
description: Banani — No-code tool for building interactive Figma prototypes with custom user flows and sharing links.

seo.title: Banani — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Banani: Banani — No-code tool for building interactive Figma prototypes with custom user flows and sharing links.

when_to_use: Interactive Figma prototype with branching user flows
Sharing clickable prototype links for usability testing
Demo flows for investor presentations built in Figma
Prototyping onboarding UX with conditional navigation
Rapid no-code prototype to validate a feature idea

review.verdict: Niche prototyping helper that overlaps heavily with Figmas built-in flows — hard to justify alone.
review.best_for: Non-designers who need quick clickable prototypes without Figma fluency
review.not_for: Design teams already invested in Figma prototyping workflows
